channel.title: Orthodox Christian Sermons: Feasts of the Saints:October 28
channel.description: Audio Orthodox Christian Sermons: Feasts of the Saints:October 28

item.title: Feasts of the Saints, New Martyrs of the Turkish Yoke, St Timothy of Esphigmenou, 2014-06-28
item.description: :Feasts of the Saints. St Timothy of Espigmenou is a New Martyr of the Turkish Yoke. (All these Saints are celebrated by many on the 3rd Sunday after Pentecost.) Here is a summary of his remarkable (even for the life of a saint!) story, which focuses on his COURAGE, love, and obedience, and how the providence of God is an irresistible, although obscure force which will always be manifested to us in the proper time.
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: :Feasts of the Saints. St Timothy of Espigmenou is a New Martyr of the Turkish Yoke. (All these Saints are celebrated by many on the 3rd Sunday after Pentecost.) Here is a summary of his remarkable (even for the life of a saint!) story, which focuses on his COURAGE, love, and obedience, and how the providence of God is an irresistible, although obscure force which will always be manifested to us in the proper time.
